title: juncus uniflorus
intro: Juncus uniflorus, also known as the one-flowered rush, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Juncaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Juncus uniflorus include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce swelling and pain. Juncus uniflorus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use.
